{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Regent of the South
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regent of the South]] is a visitor to the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regent of the South]] is a man who refers to himself as having an oath to eternity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The Consultants have a visitor,” Teach said, as she handed the winged lizard’s reins to Andel. “The Regent of the South.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Regent of the South tipped his hat back, scratching at his hairline. “My oath to eternity, it’s not so large a request.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
